get.description: Time-bucketed min/max/avg/count aggregates per metric for one greenhouse over the trailing `window` — the derived series the dashboard charts for trends, distinct from the raw telemetry range query (platform interfaces §3 analytics surface; data model §4). The window is resolved server-side against the greenhouse's latest stored (simulated) timestamp; the response `from`/`to` report the resolved span. `interval` sets the bucket size (default 1h); `metric` optionally restricts to one metric. An unknown window, interval, or metric is rejected with 422.

200.description: Aggregated series over the requested window.
